description: Letter from Sason b. Shemuel to a notable named Elʿazar (or perhaps [...] b. Elʿazar). In Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic. The sender alludes to his bad state and requests charity or help of some kind. There are a few lines in Arabic script on verso, perhaps part of the address. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
